headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Datadog (DDOG) After Its Recent Share Price Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Datadog at around US$202.84 is still offering value, or if the easy money has already been made, this breakdown will help you frame that question clearly. The stock has recently shown strong momentum, with returns of 7.5% over the past week, 83.4% over the past month, 51.6% year to date, 73.2% over 1 year, 114.6% over 3 years and 130.2% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Datadog's position in software infrastructure and how its platform fits into trends...
